name: 8_centromere_pericentric_SD
description: Chr8 pericentromere with alpha-satellite D8Z2 array and flanking pericentromeric SD mosaic. T2T-CHM13 resolves a ~5 Mb alpha-satellite array previously gapped in GRCh38.

architecture.internal_structure: Alpha-satellite D8Z2 array plus pericentromeric SDs; GRCh38 has gap, CHM13 has full assembly.
